title: ReTexture Stoneworks Tuff
description: Changes the textures of the Tuff variants added by the Stoneworks mod to match 1.21 Tuff blocks.
body:
Playing with the [Stoneworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) mod for a variety of stone variants but wishing you had the 1.21 Tuff Bricks? This resource pack ReTextures the mod's Tuff variants to match the new blocks from Tricky Trials.

![The ReTextured Tuff variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63176199b0733cb0336e26026fd4692fadb23812.png)
